heroSubtitle: A private, intentional space for custom facials. Every session is tailored to your skin, your story, and your season of life — delivered with clinical-grade products and quiet luxury.
aboutText1: Beautywell Esthetics is a licensed private studio built on the belief that the best results come from customized care.
aboutText2: Focused on you, treatment is delivered in a studio designed to feel like the exhale at the end of a long week. Every facial is customized in real time — your skin today is not your skin last month, and your ritual should reflect that.
locationNote: Exact address shared upon booking confirmation.
bookingNote: Select your treatment, find a time that works, and we'll confirm within a few hours. A 50% deposit is required to hold your appointment — non-refundable if cancelled within 48 hours.
depositPolicy: All appointments require a 50% deposit to hold your spot. Deposits are non-refundable if cancelled within 48 hours of your appointment. You'll receive payment instructions in your confirmation email.
googleCalendarNote: Paste your Google Calendar embed URL here. Go to Google Calendar → Settings → your calendar → Scroll to 'Integrate calendar' → Copy the embed URL.
